AFK_Kick_Warning.en-US: You will be kicked in {{red}}{0}{{default}} seconds for being AFK.

AFK_Kick_Announce.en-US: {{green}}{0}{{default}} has been kicked for being AFK.

AFK_Kick_Message.en-US: You were kicked for being AFK.
